free_spins.trigger: 4, 5 or 6 BONUS symbols anywhere on screen

scatter: BONUS symbol; hit 4, 5 or 6 anywhere on the screen to win 10, 15 or 20 free spins respectively
notes: Symbols pay anywhere on the screen (pay-anywhere mechanic)
Total number of the same symbol on screen at end of spin determines win value
Pays based on symbol counts: 8-9, 10-11, and 12-30
Top symbol (Mine cart): 12-30 pays $200.00, 10-11 pays $80.00, 8-9 pays $20.00 (at shown bet)
